name: Transition.Discrete

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Call `GoTo node settings` to initialize the transition.

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: The state of the transition system
aliases.type: { current : NodeId, target : Maybe TargetState, nodes : Dict NodeId (Node a b), actions : PendingMsg b }

aliases.name: MsgSettings
aliases.comment:
Actions to issue when a state transition is finished, or between
    a state change.
aliases.type: { onChange : Cmd b -> Cmd b, onBetweenChange : Cmd b -> Cmd b }

aliases.name: NodeId
aliases.comment:
The identifier for a discrete state - note that you should
    keep these unique; if not, the behaviour is unspecified

values.name: init
values.type: NodeId -> Dict NodeId (Node a b) -> Model a b

values.name: mkNode
values.type: Time -> (Time -> Cmd a) -> Node a b

values.name: update
values.type: (Msg b -> Result a b) -> Msg b -> Model a b -> ( Model a b, Cmd (Result a b) )
